tasks.description: Daily 2am PT poker intel briefing for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 3am PT world news & trends briefing for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 4am PT memes & culture drop for The Only Friends Podcast, posted to Discord #intel-staging
Daily 7am PT run-of-show for The Only Friends Podcast. Posts a condensed single-page brief to #run-of-show and the full detailed ROS to #intel-staging.

Daily 8am PT thumbnail generator for The Only Friends Podcast — reads ROS from #run-of-show, produces A/B for biggest story + alternative for 2nd biggest, judge enforces ≥70 with rebuilds, posts 3 images to #thumbnails.

Daily 8:15am PT producer audit before 8:30 pre-production for The Only Friends Podcast. Audits #intel-staging / ROS / thumbnails, promotes assets + design requests out of #intel-staging, and acts on Matt's manual notes in #producer.
Primary 7:30am PT show-graphics sweep for The Only Friends Podcast — reads #graphic-design requests, generates tone-driven 1280×720 graphics via Nano Banana Pro, posts to #assets
Late 8:05am PT show-graphics sweep for The Only Friends Podcast — catches late adds and any graphics flagged by thumbnails, finishes before 8:15 producer audit
Daily 5am PT viral-hand research cron for The Only Friends Podcast. Summary of ranked hands → #intel-staging; clip link → #assets. Feeds the B block.
Writes web/data.json every 5 min (state + skills + tools + souls) AND syncs skills/souls files into web/ so the Mission Control GitHub Pages site has editable links. Pushes to origin/main after.
tasks.schedule: Every 5 minutes, every hour, every day

ros.content:
